sql: SELECT id, name, status, email FROM users WHERE (status = #{level1} AND department = #{level2}) OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{level3}, '%')
templateSql:
SELECT id, name, status, email FROM users
<where>
    <if test="level1 != null">
        <if test="level2 != null">
            AND status = #{level1}
            AND department = #{level2}
        </if>
        <if test="level3 != null">
            OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{level3}, '%')
        </if>
    </if>
</where>
